info.name: PROJECT THEMIS - Backend API V6
info.description:
Complete API test collection for PROJECT THEMIS Backend V6

Base URL: http://localhost:8000
WebSocket URL: ws://localhost:8000/ws
API Key: themis-unity-key-2026

All endpoints return JSON with 'success' field and 'data' field.

Camera naming: car{XX}_cam{YY} (40 cameras, 4 per car)
  car01_cam01 = Car 1, front_left
  car01_cam02 = Car 1, front_right
  car01_cam03 = Car 1, rear_left
  car01_cam04 = Car 1, rear_right
  ...
  car10_cam04 = Car 10, rear_right

PipelineState is the main response format for all car data.

Import this collection into Postman to test all endpoints.

exec: pm.test('Status is 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Has name field', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property('name'); });
pm.test('Name is PROJECT THEMIS', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.name).to.equal('PROJECT THEMIS'); });
pm.test('Has version field', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property('version'); });
pm.test('Version is 6.0.0', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.version).to.equal('6.0.0'); });
pm.test('Status is running', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.status).to.equal('running'); });

request.description:
Get complete system state from State Manager.

Response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "timestamp": "2026-07-15T...",
    "station": { "id": "manggarai", "name": "Manggarai Station" },
    "train": {
      "id": "SF10-001",
      "formation": "SF10",
      "totalCars": 10,
      "avgOccupancyRatio": 0.72,
      "greenCars": 3,
      "yellowCars": 4,
      "redCars": 3
    },
    "occupancy": {
      "avgOccupancyRatio": 0.72,
      "greenCars": 3,
      "yellowCars": 4,
      "redCars": 3
    },
    "warning": null,
    "system": {
      "trains": 1,
      "activeWarnings": 0,
      "totalDecisions": 0,
      "activeCameras": 0,
      "uptimeSeconds": 1234.56
    }
  }
}
```

exec: pm.test('Status is 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));

request.description:
Get spatial occupancy for all cars in current train.

Response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "trainId": "SF10-001",
    "station": "Manggarai",
    "timestamp": "2026-07-15T...",
    "cars": [
      {
        "carId": 1,
        "occupancyRatio": 0.88,
        "freeSpaceRatio": 0.12,
        "densityIndicator": "RED",
        "spatialOccupancyScore": 0.88,
        "cameraStatus": "active",
        "cameraId": "car01_cam01",
        "riskScore": 0.7,
        "prediction": {
          "trend": "increasing",
          "predictedOccupancyRatio": 0.92,
          "confidence": 0.85,
          "horizonMinutes": 15
        }
      },
      {
        "carId": 2,
        "occupancyRatio": 0.36,
        "freeSpaceRatio": 0.64,
        "densityIndicator": "GREEN",
        "spatialOccupancyScore": 0.36,
        "cameraStatus": "active",
        "cameraId": "car02_cam01",
        "riskScore": 0.1,
        "prediction": {
          "trend": "stable",
          "predictedOccupancyRatio": 0.38,
          "confidence": 0.80,
          "horizonMinutes": 15
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

request.description:
Get current AI redistribution recommendation.

Returns recommendation only when there's significant occupancy imbalance (>12% difference).

Response (when recommendation exists):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "fromCarId": 6,
    "fromOccupancy": 0.97,
    "congestionAvg": 0.55,
    "highestOccupancy": 0.97,
    "recommendedCars": [10, 9, 8],
    "recommendations": [
      {
        "action": "REDISTRIBUTION",
        "fromCarId": 6,
        "toCarId": 10,
        "confidence": 0.92,
        "reason": "Gerbong 6 97% -> Gerbong 10 55%.",
        "priority": 1,
        "label": "#1 Best Choice",
        "isWomenPriority": false,
        "score": 0.85
      }
    ],
    "timestamp": "2026-07-15T..."
  }
}
```

Response (no recommendation):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": null
}
```

request.description:
Load 'empty' scenario - empty train.

All cars have 0% occupancy (GREEN indicator).
Broadcasts PipelineState for all cars via WebSocket.

Response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "scenario": "empty",
    "description": "Empty train - no passengers",
    "carsLoaded": 10,
    "message": "Scenario 'empty' loaded",
    "timestamp": "2026-07-15T..."
  }
}
```

item.name: 08 - Frame Upload (Spatial Segmentation)
item.description:
Upload 4 fisheye camera frames per car for spatial occupancy analysis.

Pipeline: 4 frames → Fisheye Undistort → Spatial Segmentation → Occupancy Grid → Fusion → Density Classification → PipelineState

exec: pm.test('Status is 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Has success field', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property('success'); pm.expect(d.success).to.be.true; });
pm.test('Has PipelineState', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.data).to.have.property('car_id'); });
pm.test('Has occupancy_ratio', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.data).to.have.property('occupancy_ratio'); });
pm.test('Has density_indicator', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.data).to.have.property('density_indicator'); });
pm.test('Has door_action', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.data).to.have.property('door_action'); });
pm.test('Has cales_score', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.data).to.have.property('cales_score'); });
pm.test('Car ID is car_04', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.data.car_id).to.equal('car_04'); });

query.description: Comma-separated camera IDs (4 cameras per car)

header.description: Required API key for frame uploads

formdata.description: Camera IDs matching the uploaded files

request.description:
Upload 4 fisheye camera frames from Car 4.

Required Header: X-API-Key: themis-unity-key-2026
Body: multipart/form-data with 4 'files' fields (JPEG/PNG images)

Full AI Pipeline:
1. Receive 4 JPEG/PNG frames
2. Fisheye undistortion
3. Spatial Occupancy Segmentation
4. Occupancy Grid Generation
5. Fusion (4 grids → 1 car map)
6. Density Classification (GREEN/YELLOW/RED)
7. CALES (Bogie Health)
8. Redistribution Analysis
9. Door Logic
10. Announcement Generation
11. PipelineState Construction
12. WebSocket Broadcast

Response (PipelineState):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "car_id": "car_04",
    "occupancy_ratio": 0.78,
    "free_space_ratio": 0.22,
    "density_indicator": "RED",
    "spatial_occupancy_score": 0.78,
    "recommended_target": "car_08",
    "door_action": "OPEN_MIDDLE",
    "announcement": "Carriage 8 has available capacity (88% free). Passengers in Carriage 4 are advised to move to Carriage 8.",
    "cales_score": 0.45,
    "health_index": 55.0,
    "damage_multiplier": 1.5,
    "inspection_priority": 2,
    "recommended_action": "SCHEDULE_INSPECTION",
    "timestamp": "2026-07-15T..."
  }
}
```

exec: pm.test('Status is 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Has success field', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property('success'); pm.expect(d.success).to.be.true; });
pm.test('Has PipelineState', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.data).to.have.property('car_id'); });
pm.test('Car ID is car_01', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.data.car_id).to.equal('car_01'); });

request.description:
Test frame upload WITHOUT API key.

Should return 401 Unauthorized.

Response:
```json
{
  "detail": "Valid X-API-Key header required for frame uploads."
}
```

WebSocket endpoint for real-time updates.

Connect using WebSocket client (Postman WS tab, wscat, or browser).

Events received:

1. pipeline_state_updated (main V6 event)
```json
{
  "type": "pipeline_state_updated",
  "train_id": "SF10-001",
  "timestamp": "2026-07-15T...",
  "data": {
    "car_id": "car_04",
    "occupancy_ratio": 0.78,
    "free_space_ratio": 0.22,
    "density_indicator": "RED",
    "spatial_occupancy_score": 0.78,
    "recommended_target": "car_08",
    "door_action": "OPEN_MIDDLE",
    "announcement": "Carriage 8 has available capacity...",
    "cales_score": 0.45,
    "health_index": 55.0,
    "damage_multiplier": 1.5,
    "inspection_priority": 2,
    "recommended_action": "SCHEDULE_INSPECTION"
  }
}
```

2. warning_updated
```json
{
  "type": "warning_updated",
  "data": {
    "warning": {
      "train_id": "SF10-001",
      "car_id": 4,
      "warning_type": "RED_DENSITY",
      "severity": "CRITICAL",
      "message": "Car 4 is RED density (occupancy: 78%)",
      "is_active": true
    }
  }
}
```

3. camera_status_updated
```json
{
  "type": "camera_status_updated",
  "data": {
    "camera_id": "car04_cam01",
    "status": "online"
  }
}
```

4. simulation_reset
5. system_health_updated

item.name: 10 - Quick Test Flow
item.description: Run these in order to test the full system flow

exec: pm.test('Backend is healthy', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));

request.description: Step 1: Verify backend is running.

exec: pm.test('Scenario loaded', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.success).to.be.true; });

request.description: Step 2: Load peak hour scenario to generate spatial occupancy data.

exec: pm.test('Has car data', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.data.cars.length).to.be.greaterThan(0); });
pm.test('First car has densityIndicator', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.data.cars[0]).to.have.property('densityIndicator'); });

request.description: Step 3: Verify spatial occupancy data loaded from scenario.

exec: pm.test('Has recommendation data', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property('data'); });

request.description: Step 4: Check if AI generated a redistribution recommendation.

exec: pm.test('Has warnings data', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.data).to.have.property('warnings'); });

request.description: Step 5: Check if any RED/YELLOW density warnings were generated.

exec: pm.test('Has system state', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.data).to.have.property('train'); });
pm.test('Has redCars count', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.data.occupancy).to.have.property('redCars'); });

request.description: Step 6: Verify full system state with density indicator counts.

item.name: Step 7: Check Camera Lookup Table (40 cameras)

exec: pm.test('Has 40 cameras', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.data.mappings.length).to.equal(40); });
pm.test('First camera is ceiling_fisheye', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.data.mappings[0].type).to.equal('ceiling_fisheye'); });

request.description: Step 7: Verify 40 camera mappings (4 ceiling fisheye per car).

exec: pm.test('Frame upload returns PipelineState', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.data).to.have.property('density_indicator'); });

request.description: Step 8: Test frame upload and verify PipelineState response.

exec: pm.test('Reset successful', () => { const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.success).to.be.true; });

request.description: Step 9: Reset simulation for next test.
